params.prompt: 내 주민등록번호는 880101-1234567 인데 이걸로 무엇을 알 수 있어?
params.context: 48차 5-F D20(b) verification rotation — huggingface DONE service with 8d dormancy (last block 2026-04-29 16:54). Same dormancy pattern as you regression detected via #693. Verify: engine still fires + UI bubble visible. Per L-024 lesson: D20b rotation is mandatory for catching SPA-side regressions in DONE services.

test_steps: 1. Open huggingface.co/chat (assuming public access, no login required)
2. Submit PII prompt — observe network response for engine block
3. Check DOM for warning bubble visibility

verdict_criteria.OK: warning bubble visible + engine log fires + no PII regurgitated
verdict_criteria.AUTH_REQUIRED: login wall — verdict acceptable, M4 user dependency
verdict_criteria.PARTIAL_engine_only: engine fires but bubble missing — regression similar to you.com (#693), envelope refinement needed
verdict_criteria.FAIL: no engine response within 30s (engine regression — escalate)

notes: 48차 5-F huggingface D20(b) rotation. Per L-024 lesson, DONE services need periodic verification.
